desc:
f16v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎直立穿过叶片。顶端有一朵白色杯状小花，中心带有深色半圆状花芯。
叶片：巨大的深绿色伞状或心形叶片，几乎遮盖了主茎中部，边缘圆润。
根部：浅色块状根系。横向延伸，生有数个不规则的球状突起，并带有细小的点状纹理。

Stem & Flowers: A single stem rising through the center of the leaf. A small white cup-shaped flower at the top with a dark semi-circular center.
Leaves: A massive, deep-green umbrella or heart-shaped leaf covering the middle of the stem, with rounded edges.
Roots: Pale-colored tuberous root system. Extends horizontally with several irregular globular swellings and fine dotted textures.
